name: Hunyuan3D 2.1
description: Lightweight Hunyuan3D variant with 0.6B parameters. Fast generation with optional PBR texture support.
author: Tvixen

params_schema.label: Quality
params_schema.tooltip: Number of diffusion steps. More steps = better quality but slower.

params_schema.label: Mesh Resolution
params_schema.tooltip: Octree resolution for mesh reconstruction. Higher = more detail but slower and more VRAM.

params_schema.label: Guidance Scale
params_schema.tooltip: Classifier-free guidance strength. Higher = closer to the input image.

params_schema.label: Seed
params_schema.tooltip: Seed for reproducibility. Set to -1 for a random seed.
